subject: Removing pass_enc_key from DMaaP prov props
commit_message:
Removing pass_enc_key from DMaaP prov props

    # Also adding AAF ready check for dr-node

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1367
